chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Ali Ibn Al-nuʿman

text: ه عن الحسن بن عليّ بن النعمان فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن النعمان‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Al-Nuʿman, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Al-Nuʿman.
